top_signals.title: Gold slumps to 6-month low even as inflation fears rise. Here's why bullion is out of favor
top_signals.summary: The yellow metal is at lowest level of the year as potential interest rate increases and faltering technical signals weigh on prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Oracle shares tumble 11% on increased capital raise, cash concerns
top_signals.summary: Oracle beat on earnings and revenue, but negative free cash flow and the company's plan to raise more capital is weighing on the stock.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
